channel.title: Godswar Online on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Godswar Online on Chasing Dings!

item.title: GodsWar Online -- the easiest MMO you'll ever play
item.description:
I’m a sucker for Facebook games; it’s my not-so-secret dirty little secret. Especially RPGs. ESPECIALLY MMOs! That’s just gonna be made of win for me. There’s been a little pirate panda sitting on my ad bar for a couple of weeks now. First 3D Facebook MMO, hmm, okay. I went to the page and it said this about the game:

GodsWar Online is the first fully IGG designed and produced 3D MMORPG. Journey back in time to the land of heroes and legends. Choose sides in the epic battles between Athens and Sparta, fight glorious campaigns alongside demigods and complete quests that will take you across the ancient world. Remember, history is written by the victors, will that be you?
